name: feature-loader-c6-spike-5
description: Phase 1 spike — VERDICT (sample 5 of 5). Loads Penumbra one final time, reads the accumulated C6 cache report, and emits the verdict for `penumbra-render-atlas`. The console.log line `[c6-verdict] ...` is the load-bearing output of the entire suite — its content tells us whether Chrome's DawnWebGPUCache hits across reloads (H_A → close C6, do nothing) or misses (H_B → kick off Phase 1.1: convert atlas pipeline to layout: 'auto'). Test passes whenever the report is available; the human reads the verdict from the log.

commands: (() => { const r = window.__canaryGetC6CacheReport(); if (!r || r.ok === false) throw new Error('C6 report unavailable: ' + JSON.stringify(r)); const atlas = r.labels && r.labels['penumbra-render-atlas']; if (!atlas || atlas.samples < 2) throw new Error('insufficient samples for verdict — got ' + (atlas && atlas.samples) + '. Did the spike-1..5 sequence run in order with localStorage persistence?'); const verdict = atlas.suggestsCacheHit ? 'CACHE HIT (H_A: cache works across reloads — close C6 spike, no work needed)' : 'NO CLEAR HIT (H_B: cache likely misses — open Phase 1.1 to switch atlas pipeline to layout: auto)'; const summary = '[c6-verdict] cold=' + atlas.coldMs.toFixed(0) + 'ms warmAvg=' + (atlas.warmAvgMs == null ? 'n/a' : atlas.warmAvgMs.toFixed(0) + 'ms') + ' samples=' + atlas.samples + ' totalSavings=' + r.totalWarmSavingsMs.toFixed(0) + 'ms → ' + verdict; console.log(summary); for (const [label, lr] of Object.entries(r.labels)) { console.log('[c6-verdict-detail] ' + label + ': cold=' + lr.coldMs.toFixed(0) + 'ms warmAvg=' + (lr.warmAvgMs == null ? 'n/a' : lr.warmAvgMs.toFixed(0) + 'ms') + ' samples=' + lr.samples); } return summary; })()
